name: futures_carry_term_structure_v1
binding_question: Can we compute futures carry from clean front+next contract prices+expiries, without relying on a single back-adjusted continuous series?

ES (e-mini S&P futures).label: continuous_only
ES (e-mini S&P futures).note: continuous front only; usable for trend baselines, NOT carry

CL (WTI crude futures).label: continuous_only
CL (WTI crude futures).note: continuous front only; dated NYMEX contracts not served by yfinance

SI/NG/ZC/ZS/ZW (commodity futures).label: continuous_only
SI/NG/ZC/ZS/ZW (commodity futures).note: continuous front at best; no curve

Rates futures (ZN/ZB/ZF).label: reject
Rates futures (ZN/ZB/ZF).note: no clean free source for the curve in this environment

FX futures (6E/6J/6B).label: reject
FX futures (6E/6J/6B).note: no clean free source for the curve

Massive us_futures_* flat files.label: reject
Massive us_futures_* flat files.note: session/minute/trades/quotes per-contract data EXISTS in catalogue (2017-2024) but GetObject=403 (paid entitlement); not downloadable

VXX/VXZ (VIX term-structure ETNs).label: proxy_not_native_futures
VXX/VXZ (VIX term-structure ETNs).note: ETN price embeds VIX-futures roll yield; clean free history; term-structure SLOPE proxy, NOT native front/next prices

USO/USL (WTI oil curve ETFs).label: proxy_not_native_futures
USO/USL (WTI oil curve ETFs).note: USO/USL relationship reflects WTI curve shape; clean free history; proxy, NOT native curve

UNG (natgas ETF).label: proxy_not_native_futures
UNG (natgas ETF).note: single front proxy; contango bleed only

carry_formula.native_intended: carry_t = ln(F_front_t / F_next_t) * (365 / (expiry_next - expiry_front in days))
carry_formula.sign_convention: positive => backwardation (front > next) => positive roll yield to a long holder
carry_formula.annualization: 365 / (calendar days between front and next expiry)
carry_formula.contracts_used: front and first deferred (next) contract; raw (unadjusted) contract prices
carry_formula.missing_next_handling: no carry signal on dates lacking a clean next-contract price
carry_formula.near_expiry_handling: enforce min_days_to_expiry on the front (e.g. 5 trading days); roll before front expiry; never compute carry from an expiring front inside the threshold
carry_formula.leakage_rule: signal at date t uses only contracts and expiries known at date t; carry computed from RAW prices BEFORE any back-adjustment
carry_formula.proxy_intended: term-structure SLOPE proxy = ln(P_mid / P_short) e.g. ln(VXZ/VXX) or ln(USL/USO); labeled proxy_not_native_futures; NOT a native roll yield

cost_model.native_futures: NOT applicable in v1 (no native data). Reference: ES ~0.25-tick spread + ~$2-4/contract commission; CL ~1-tick; roll cost ~1 spread/roll.
cost_model.etf_proxies: VXX/VXZ/USO ~1-2 bps spread, ~0 commission (liquid); USL/UNG slightly wider. 2x cost stress + 1-bar delay stress feasible.
cost_model.verdict: native cost model cannot be exercised (no native data); proxy cost model is feasible -> proxy markets are research-only at best.
